title: Video: Stranded Humpback Whale Beats the Odds and Swims Out to Sea
summary_full: In an unexpected breakthrough, the 40-foot mammal was freed and swam to deeper water on Friday morning through a channel that rescuers had dug for it.
summary_public: In an unexpected breakthrough, the 40-foot mammal was freed and swam to deeper water on Friday morning through a channel that rescuers had dug for it.
